core_philosophy: Minimalista, elegante, claro, rápido, intuitivo y profesional. No web recargada. Priorizar claridad, velocidad, facilidad de uso y confianza. Diseño centrado en mobile-first con un flujo de compra sin fricciones.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the school names and product photos to act as the primary visual anchors.

grids.schools_grid: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Colegio Talca MUST span 12 cols (or 8 cols with image) to be the hero/featured item. Other schools span 4 cols each.
grids.product_grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8. High visual impact per item.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4D4D] text-white hover:bg-[#E63E3E] transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors hover:bg-gray-100 px-4 py-2

cards.product: Group element with image overflow hidden, flat layout (no shadow by default). Subdued 1px border (#E5E7EB) on hover. Title and price left-aligned underneath.
cards.school: Flat bento card, bg-white, 1px border border-gray-200. Hover: border-gray-400, subtle translate-y-[-2px].

navigation.header: Sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-white/80. Minimal links. Cart icon with absolute positioned badge for item count.
navigation.cart: Slide-over drawer (Shadcn Sheet) from the right. Clear order summary, edit quantities, primary checkout button.

product_detail.size_selector: Grid of small rectangular buttons (grid-cols-4 or 5). Selected state: bg-black text-white. Unselected: border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:border-black.

admin_panel.style: Strict, dense, function-first (Archetype 4). High contrast table layouts (border-collapse). Flat UI without card shadows. Left aligned navigation sidebar.

interactions.hover: Subtle border color darkening or simple background shifts. No heavy bouncing or 3D effects.

logo.description: Trabalengua Escolares main logo (Black cursive 'tl.' with coral/red dot accent).

hero_background.description: Elegant facade of a school building (Colegio Talca placeholder), to be used with a white/transparent or black/30 overlay.

icons.style: stroke-width 1.5, simple and unadorned (Cart, Chevron, Menu, User, X)

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='school-select-talca').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for Body.
Ensure Colegio Talca is visually dominant on the home page (larger image, spans more columns).
Keep sizes distinct: 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, S, M, L, XL (total 11).
Implement the 'bank transfer' workflow at Checkout, not a credit card gateway.
Do NOT use generic border-radius (rounded-xl) heavily; keep shapes sharp (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to match the elegant minimal vibe.
Apply data-testid to every interactive component.
